name: Suffering with Tang Sanzang
short_description: You are Tang Monk, in order to rescue Wukong, climb Wuzhishan with a golden cudgel in hand! For people who enjoy suffering, or those who enjoy making friends suffer.
detailed_description:
This game is based on the Chinese mythology "Journey to the West". The protagonist, Tang Sanzang, uses a golden cudgel to climb Mount Wuzhi in order to liberate Sun Wukong. Along the way, he will encounter various incredible difficulties.

Become Tang Sanzang and understand Tang Sanzang!

Tip: If you get stuck during the game, interact more with Wukong to seek help.

Feature

  • Use a stretchable golden cudgel to climb steep cliffs.

  • A small mistake can make you fall back to the bottom!

  • Avoid thunderclouds Otherwise, it will be blasted away!

  • Accept Sun Wukong's crazy mockery!

  • Feeling sad? Then cry.

Basic operation

  • Point with the mouse and use the scroll wheel to adjust the base length of the gold hoop.

  • Press and hold the space to extend the golden hoop.

  • Press the C key to cry loudly.

Background story

Buddha said: Those from Nanshanbu Continent indulge in sensual pleasures (Hifi and 8K), kill and compete more (werewolf killing and qualifying). I have a low budget mini game now, with an ugly art style and a headache when looking at it; The difficulty is incredible, and even your head is cracked when playing. The one who can overcome this difficulty by seeking good faith in your land today must be the one who traveled westward to obtain scriptures.

Developer's words

  • This is a self punishment style game inspired by "Getting Over It with Bennett Foddy" and "Jump King".

  • As is well known, Tang Monk had to go through 81 difficulties to retrieve the scriptures. In addition to this difficulty level, the following 80 difficulties will be released as DLC and presented in different game formats, hoping to have a style that you like.

  • If you feel the difficulty is too low, please contact me promptly.

Warning!

This game is not suitable for players with a history of epilepsy, photosensitivity, heart disease, hypertension, cerebral thrombosis, psychiatric disorders, and other related medical conditions.

supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, French, Italian, German, Russian, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Arabic, Korean
